# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-01

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-eraseme
- HEAD: fe72850f3a70a29ddfeaa95e830c79766d4cfb82
- Last release: v0.7.0 (2026-06-30)
- Proposed target: v0.8.0 (bump: minor)
- Gate: pass

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI workflow succeeded; CodeQL succeeded; 1 local test failure is environment-specific (OllamaClient — `test_llm_factory.py`) |
| Version consistency | PASS | pyproject.toml version corrected 0.6.2 → 0.8.0 (mechanical fix applied) |
| README / doc currency | WARN | MCP server description stale (says "one tool: redact_file" but exposes 21 tools); new features not listed; CHANGELOG missing v0.6.2 and v0.7.0 entries |
| Coverage vs threshold | PASS | 78% overall / no hard repo gate defined (warn-only) |
| Coverage regression | PASS | baseline 78% → 78% (delta 0%); no regression |
| Patch coverage | PASS | n/a — unreleased diff contains only CI workflow YAML and Jinja2 template (no Python source changes) |
| Assets preview | PASS | publish.yml builds .whl + .tar.gz on release (same as v0.7.0 pattern) |
| Security | PASS | 0 open code-scanning alerts, 0 open Dependabot alerts, 0 open secret-scanning alerts |

## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] README MCP server description stale**
  - **Status quo:** README.md line 39 says "exposes a `redact_file` tool" and line 258 says "The MCP server exposes one tool" — but `src/symeraseme/mcp_server.py` now defines 21 tools (redact_file, plan_create, plan_show, execute, poll_inbox, classify_reply, generate_rebuttal, generate_dashboard, generate_report, manual_tasks_list, manual_tasks_show, manual_tasks_complete, manual_tasks_cleanup, generate_scheduler, schedule_install, schedule_uninstall, schedule_status, validate, run_web_form, auto_confirm, grant).
  - **Likely cause:** README was not updated when MCP expansion shipped in PRs #476/#481.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update README MCP section to reflect 21 tools, or make it version-agnostic ("exposes CLI operations as MCP tools").
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] New features not reflected in README**
  - **Status quo:** Multi-folder poll-inbox (#481), Himalaya v1.2 compat (#480), AgentLLMClient (#470), cron-based polling (#477), dashboard UI optimization (#488) are not listed in README features section.
  - **Likely cause:** README feature list was not updated for v0.7.0 and post-v0.7.0 changes.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add new features to README Features section.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] CHANGELOG missing v0.6.2 and v0.7.0 entries**
  - **Status quo:** CHANGELOG.md jumps from v0.6.1 to v0.6.0; no v0.6.2 or v0.7.0 entries exist.
  - **Likely cause:** v0.6.2 and v0.7.0 were released without updating CHANGELOG.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add v0.6.2 and v0.7.0 entries to CHANGELOG, or include in v0.8.0 release notes.
  - **Handoff:** Include in v0.8.0 release commit

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `pyproject.toml:3` version `0.6.2` → `0.8.0` (corrected to match target v0.8.0)

## Next step
- gate=pass → `/07-gh-release`
